name: delegation-brief-oversized-advisory
description: A clean low-risk record ships, but its delegation ledger carries a hand-off brief far over the 4000-char advisory ceiling (brief_chars honored over the truncated brief_summary). verify-gates emits a non-blocking note and still exits 0 — an oversized brief is a context-bloat signal, never a gate failure.

record.goal: Clarify the install step in README
acceptance_criteria: README install step reads correctly; no behavior change

delegations.brief_summary: review the slice diff (full brief truncated)
